Pressure Ratio.critical_message: Pressure Ratio is {value:.2f}, below 14.0. Compressor fouling or IGV misalignment likely.
Pressure Ratio.warning_message: Pressure Ratio is {value:.2f}, slightly below 15.0. Monitor trend; consider performance check.

Compressor Temp Rise.critical_message: Temp Rise is {value:.1f}°C, above 420°C. Excessive = fouling or worn seals. Schedule maintenance.
Compressor Temp Rise.warning_message: Temp Rise is {value:.1f}°C, approaching 410°C. Monitor; consider online wash.

Inlet Filter DP.critical_message: Filter DP is {value:.1f} mmwc, exceeding 80 mmwc. Replace filters immediately.
Inlet Filter DP.warning_message: Filter DP is {value:.1f} mmwc, near 60 mmwc. Schedule replacement soon.

Max Exhaust Spread.critical_message: Exhaust spread is {value:.1f}°C, above 40°C. Combustor damage likely. Inspect cans and fuel nozzles.
Max Exhaust Spread.warning_message: Exhaust spread is {value:.1f}°C, near 30°C. Uneven combustion. Monitor, consider fuel nozzle inspection.

Avg Exhaust Spread.critical_message: Avg exhaust spread is {value:.1f}°C, above 30°C. Uneven combustion.
Avg Exhaust Spread.warning_message: Avg exhaust spread is {value:.1f}°C, near 25°C. Monitor.

Spread to Allowable.critical_message: Spread is {value:.1f}% of allowable. Exceeding 80%. Immediate borescope inspection required.
Spread to Allowable.warning_message: Spread is {value:.1f}% of allowable. Approaching 70%. Schedule inspection.

Flame Stability (Std Dev).critical_message: Flame std dev is {value:.2f}%, above 5%. Combustion instability detected. Reduce load, check fuel pressure.
Flame Stability (Std Dev).warning_message: Flame std dev is {value:.2f}%, near 3%. Slight instability. Monitor fuel gas composition.

Bearing Temp Rise.critical_message: Bearing temp rise is {value:.1f}°C, above 15°C. Check oil flow, inspect bearing. Immediate action.
Bearing Temp Rise.warning_message: Bearing temp rise is {value:.1f}°C, near 10°C. Monitor oil temperature and vibration.

Max Vibration.critical_message: Vibration is {value:.2f} mm/s, above 7.0. Stop unit for inspection (rotor imbalance / bearing wear).
Max Vibration.warning_message: Vibration is {value:.2f} mm/s, near 5.0. Monitor trend; schedule vibration analysis.

Avg Vibration.critical_message: Avg vibration is {value:.2f} mm/s, above 5.5. Bearing wear likely.
Avg Vibration.warning_message: Avg vibration is {value:.2f} mm/s, near 4.0. Monitor.

Power Factor.critical_message: PF is {value:.3f}, outside 0.85–0.98. Excitation issue or grid demand. Check AVR.
Power Factor.warning_message: PF is {value:.3f}, slightly outside optimal 0.90–0.96. Monitor reactive power.

Fuel per MW.critical_message: Fuel per MW is {value:.1f} kg/MWh, above 160. Excessive consumption. Check compressor and combustion.
Fuel per MW.warning_message: Fuel per MW is {value:.1f} kg/MWh, near 150. Monitor heat rate and compressor health.

Fuel Pressure Drop.critical_message: Fuel pressure drop is {value:.2f} kg/cm², above 3.0. Filter blocked. Bypass or replace immediately.
Fuel Pressure Drop.warning_message: Fuel pressure drop is {value:.2f} kg/cm², near 2.0. Schedule replacement.

Gross Heat Rate.critical_message: HR is {value:.0f} kJ/kWh, above 10500. Significant degradation. Review compressor, turbine, fuel system.
Gross Heat Rate.warning_message: HR is {value:.0f} kJ/kWh, near 10000. Monitor trend; investigate degradation.

Efficiency.critical_message: Efficiency is {value:.1f}%, below 34%. Major maintenance likely required.
Efficiency.warning_message: Efficiency is {value:.1f}%, near 36%. Efficiency declining; investigate.

Load (MW).critical_message: Load is {value:.1f} MW, outside 200–270 MW. Check plant dispatch.
Load (MW).warning_message: Load is {value:.1f} MW, near 200 or 270 MW. Monitor grid demand.
